parameters.query:
SELECT 
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN estado IN ('REGISTRADO', 'ACTIVO') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::integer as registrados,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN estado = 'CALIFICADO' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::integer as leads_calificados,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(ultimo_contacto) >= '{{ $json.query.startDate }}'::date AND DATE(ultimo_contacto) <= '{{ $json.query.endDate }}'::date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)::integer as leads_nuevos_mes,
    0.0::numeric as tasa_conversion_pct,
    0::integer as ingresos_mes
FROM alumnos
WHERE DATE(ultimo_contacto) >= '{{ $json.query.startDate }}'::date
AND DATE(ultimo_contacto) <= '{{ $json.query.endDate }}'::date
